---
title: "Projects"
title-block-banner: true
image: /assets/images/social-profile.png
image-alt: "Profile picture of Mickaël CANOUIL"
subtitle: "*[{{< iconify fa7-solid:square-rss >}} RSS Feed](/projects/index.xml)*"
listing:
  - id: projects
    template: ../assets/listing-templates/projects.ejs
    categories: false
    sort-ui: [date, title]
    sort: "date desc"
    filter-ui: true
    max-description-length: 300
    page-size: 9
    fields: [image, title, description, categories, featured]
    feed:
      language: en-gb
    contents:

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-prism
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-prism.png
        title: "Prism"
        description: 'A Quarto filter extension that attaches format-specific values to a single Div, Span, or CodeBlock and lets each output format pick its own.'
        date: "2026-05-03"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Filter, Conditional, HTML, Reveal.js, Typst]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-codefrag
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-revealjs-codefrag.png
        title: "Code Annotation Fragments"
        description: 'A Reveal.js plugin that enables fragment-based keyboard navigation through code annotations in Quarto presentations.'
        date: "2026-04-14"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Reveal.js, Code, Annotations, Fragments]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-cascade
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-revealjs-cascade.png
        title: "Cascade"
        description: 'A Quarto extension that automatically repeats the heading chain when new Reveal.js slides are created with `---`, following the DRY principle.'
        date: "2026-04-08"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Reveal.js, Headings]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-fragmention
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-revealjs-fragmention.png
        title: "Fragmention"
        description: 'A Quarto filter extension that hoists `.fragment` attributes from empty marker spans to their parent list items in Reveal.js presentations, so bullets and numbers appear together with their content.'
        date: "2026-04-05"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Reveal.js, Fragments, Lists]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-a11y
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-revealjs-a11y.png
        title: "A11y"
        description: 'A Quarto Reveal.js plugin providing accessibility enhancements: skip navigation, focus indicators, reduced motion, high contrast mode, font and text-spacing controls, colour overlays, ARIA slide landmarks, and screen reader announcements.'
        date: "2026-03-29"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Reveal.js, Accessibility, A11y]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-typst-render
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-typst-render.png
        title: "Typst Render"
        description: 'A Quarto filter extension that compiles Typst code blocks and inline expressions to images (PNG, SVG, PDF) using the Typst binary bundled with Quarto, making Typst output usable across all formats.'
        date: "2026-03-08"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Typst, Filter]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-code-window
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-code-window.png
        title: "Code Window"
        description: 'A Quarto extension that adds window-style decorations (macOS traffic lights, Windows title bar buttons, or plain filename bars) to code blocks in HTML, Reveal.js, and Typst outputs.'
        date: "2026-02-27"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Code, HTML, Reveal.js, Typst]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-offcanvas
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-offcanvas.png
        title: "Offcanvas"
        description: 'A Quarto extension providing a simple way to create Bootstrap 5 offcanvas sliding panels in HTML documents.'
        date: "2025-11-30"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Bootstrap, Offcanvas, HTML]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-extensions-updater
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-extensions-updater.png
        title: "Quarto Extensions Updater (GitHub Action)"
        description: 'A GitHub Action that automatically updates Quarto extensions in your repository, similar to how Dependabot manages dependencies.'
        date: "2025-10-19"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, GitHub Action, Quarto Wizard]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-tabset
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-revealjs-tabset.png
        title: "Tabset"
        description: 'Quarto extension enabling proper tabset navigation with keyboard controls and PDF export support for Reveal.js presentations'
        date: "2025-11-24"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Reveal.js, Tabset, Navigation]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-remember
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-remember.png
        title: "Remember"
        description: 'An extension for Quarto to save and restore navigation position across page visits for both HTML documents and Reveal.js presentations.'
        date: "2025-10-30"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, bookmark, remember, navigation-tracker]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-collapse-output
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-collapse-output.png
        title: "Collapse Output"
        description: 'A Quarto extension that provides the ability to collapse code cell outputs in HTML documents using collapsible `<details>` elements.'
        date: "2025-10-09"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Collapse, Details, Code Output]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-gitlink
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-gitlink.png
        title: "Git Link"
        description: 'Use Git hosting platforms references (commits, issues, discussions, and pull requests) directly into your Quarto documents.'
        date: "2025-08-23"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Git, Auto-link, Short-link, GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Gitea]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-mcanouil
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-mcanouil.png
        title: "Mickaël CANOUIL"
        description: 'A Quarto extension that provides brand theming and styling for documents (HTML, Typst) and presentations (Reveal.js).'
        date: "2025-08-14"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Brand, Typst, HTML, Reveal.js]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-toc-depth
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-toc-depth.png
        title: "TOC Depth"
        description: 'A Quarto extension that provides fine-grained control over table of contents depth at the header level.'
        date: "2025-08-13"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, TOC, Depth, Table of Contents]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-modal
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-modal.png
        title: "Modal"
        description: 'A Quarto extension providing a simple way to create Bootstrap modals in your HTML documents.'
        date: "2025-07-27"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Modal, Bootstrap]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-external
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-external.png
        title: "External"
        description: 'Quarto extension to include content or partial content from external file.'
        date: "2025-07-25"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Include, External]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/mastering-quarto-cli
        image: /projects/assets/images/mastering-quarto-cli.png
        title: "Mastering Quarto CLI: From Authoring to Publishing"
        description: 'A two-day Physalia workshop on the Quarto CLI covering authoring, multi-format publishing, reproducible research, and brand theming, with R, Python, Julia, and Jupyter examples.'
        date: "2025-04-11"
        categories: [Workshop, Quarto, Typst, R, Python, Julia, Jupyter]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-language-cell-decorator
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-language-cell-decorator.png
        title: "Language Cell Decorator"
        description: 'Quarto extension to add a decorator to the code cells to display the language name.'
        date: "2025-02-22"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Language, Decorator]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-extensions
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-extensions.png
        title: "Quarto Extensions"
        description: 'A listing of {{< iconify simple-icons:quarto title="Quarto Logo" label="Quarto Logo" >}} Quarto extensions using {{< iconify octicon:mark-github-16 title="GitHub" label="GitHub" >}} GitHub API to retrieve information from the repositories.'
        date: "2023-05-31"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Listing, Quarto Wizard]
        featured: true

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-div-reuse
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-div-reuse.png
        title: "Div Reuse"
        description: 'The power of "code/content reuse" for seamless and efficient content creation.'
        date: "2025-02-03"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Code, Reuse]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-workflows
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-workflows.png
        title: "Quarto Workflows"
        description: 'Reusable GitHub Actions workflows to release Quarto extensions and deploy Reveal.js slides to GitHub Pages.'
        date: "2025-04-05"
        categories: [Quarto, GitHub Action, Reveal.js]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-wizard
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-wizard.png
        title: "Quarto Wizard"
        description: "Quarto Wizard is a Visual Studio Code extension that assists you in managing Quarto projects."
        date: "2024-11-15"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Quarto Wizard, Visual Studio Code, Positron]
        featured: true

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-github
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-github.png
        title: "GitHub"
        description: "Use GitHub short references (commits, issues, discussions, and pull request) directly into your Quarto documents."
        date: "2024-07-14"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, HTML, Reveal.js, LaTeX, Typst, Docx]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-highlight-text
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-highlight-text.png
        title: "Highlight-text"
        description: "Quarto extension that allows to highlight text in a document for various formats: HTML, LaTeX, Typst, Docx, PowerPoint, Reveal.js, and Beamer."
        date: "2024-05-03"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, HTML, Reveal.js, LaTeX, Typst, Docx]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-invoice
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-invoice.png
        title: "Invoice (Typst)"
        description: "Quarto Typst template extension to make invoices."
        date: "2023-11-24"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, HTML]
        template: true

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-codespaces
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-codespaces.png
        title: "Quarto Codespaces"
        description: 'A Quarto Codespaces / Dev Containers setup for quick online testing of Quarto projects.'
        date: "2023-10-06"
        categories: [Quarto, Codespaces, Dev Containers]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-badge
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-badge.png
        title: "Version Badge"
        description: "Badge is an extension for Quarto to provide a shortcode to display software version or anything as a badge."
        date: "2023-06-20"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, HTML]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-preview-colour
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-preview-colour.png
        title: "Preview Colour"
        description: "A Quarto extension to add preview colour as a coloured symbol next to colour code in HTML, PDF, Typst, Docx, Reveal.js, Beamer, and PowerPoint."
        date: "2023-06-15"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, HTML, Reveal.js, LaTeX]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-spotlight
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-revealjs-spotlight.png
        title: "Spotlight"
        description: "A Quarto extension for Reveal.js allowing to highlight the current mouse position with a spotlight."
        date: "2023-02-10"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Reveal.js]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-lua-env
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-lua-env.png
        title: "Lua Env"
        description: "`lua-env` is an extension for Quarto to provide access to LUA objects as metadata."
        date: "2023-01-22"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-animate
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-animate.png
        title: "Animate"
        description: "A Quarto extension providing support to `animate.css`."
        date: "2022-09-03"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, HTML]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-elevator
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-elevator.png
        title: "Elevator"
        description: "A Quarto extension providing support to `Elevator.js`."
        date: "2022-09-12"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, HTML]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-masonry
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-masonry.png
        title: "Masonry"
        description: "A Quarto extension providing support to `Masonry.js`."
        date: "2022-10-28"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, HTML]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-iconify
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-iconify.png
        title: "Iconify"
        description: "A Quarto extension providing support to free and open source icons provided by **Iconify**."
        date: "2022-08-13"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, HTML]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-letter
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-letter.png
        title: "Letter"
        description: "A Quarto template that assists you in creating a manuscript using the letter format."
        date: "2022-08-21"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Format, LaTeX]
        template: true

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-storybook
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-revealjs-storybook.png
        title: "Storybook"
        description: "A old tale book style Quarto template extension for Reveal.js presentation."
        date: "2022-07-20"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Format, Reveal.js]
        template: true

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-revealjs-coeos
        image: /projects/assets/images/quarto-revealjs-coeos.png
        title: "Coeos"
        description: "A dark grey Quarto template extension for Reveal.js presentation."
        date: "2022-07-20"
        categories: [Quarto, Extension, Format, Reveal.js]
        template: true

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/mickael.canouil.fr
        image: /projects/assets/images/mc.png
        title: "Mickaël CANOUIL's Website"
        description: "Personal website of Mickaël CANOUIL made with Quarto."
        date: "2022-12-05"
        categories: [Quarto, HTML]

      - path: https://github.com/RLille/rlille.fr
        image: /projects/assets/images/rlille.png
        title: "R Lille Website"
        description: "R Lille R User Group website made with Quarto."
        date: "2022-05-14"
        categories: [Quarto, HTML]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/awesome-quarto
        image: /projects/assets/images/awesome-quarto.png
        title: "Awesome Quarto"
        description: "A curated list of Quarto talks, tools, examples & articles!"
        date: "2022-08-01"
        categories: [Quarto]
        featured: true

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/radvanced
        image: /projects/assets/images/radvanced.png
        title: "R Advanced Introduction (French)"
        description: "A 6-hours introduction workshop/course on objects and types in R."
        date: "2021-10-07"
        categories: [Workshop, Course, R, French]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/rshiny
        image: /projects/assets/images/rshiny.png
        title: "Shiny: First Steps (French)"
        description: "A one-day workshop on the R package shiny."
        date: "2021-10-08"
        categories: [Workshop, R, Shiny, French]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/rpackages
        image: /projects/assets/images/rpackages.png
        title: "R Packages"
        description: "A 30 minutes introduction to building R packages."
        date: "2020-01-31"
        categories: [Workshop, R, R package, French]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/ggpacman
        image: /projects/assets/images/ggpacman.png
        title: "ggpacman"
        description: "A `ggplot2` and `gganimate` version of Pac-Man."
        date: "2020-03-22"
        categories: [R package]

      - path: https://github.com/umr1283/umr1283
        image: /projects/assets/images/umr1283.png
        title: "umr1283: UMR 1283 - Project Template"
        description: |
          An R package to create the project structure within the Inserm U1283 / CNRS UMR 8199 unit.
        date: "2020-02-14"
        categories: [R package]

      - path: https://rlille.fr/
        image: /projects/assets/images/rlille.png
        title: R Lille
        description: |
          R Lille is an R User Group (RUG) located in Lille, France.
          R Lille is part of the [Meetup](https://www.meetup.com/) RUG network sponsored by the [R&nbsp;Consortium](https://www.r-consortium.org/).
        date: "2020-02-01"
        categories: [R User Group]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/insane
        image: /projects/assets/images/insane.png
        title: "insane: INsulin Secretion ANalysEr"
        description: |
          A user-friendly interface, using Shiny, to analyse glucose-stimulated insulin secretion (GSIS) assays in pancreatic beta cells or islets.
        date: "2019-02-13"
        categories: [R package]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/MiSTr
        image: /projects/assets/images/mistr.png
        title: "MiSTr: Mixed effects Score Test"
        description: |
          Test for association between a set of SNPS/genes and continuous or binary outcomes by including variant characteristic information and using (weighted) score statistics.
          `MiSTr` is an improvement of the [`MiST`](https://cran.r-project.org/package=MiST) outputs.
        date: "2018-06-13"
        categories: [R package]
      - image: /projects/assets/images/nacho.png
        title: "NACHO: NAnostring quality Control dasHbOard"
        description: |
          A shiny-based dashboard to load, visualise and normalise the exported NanoString nCounter data and facilitates the user in performing a quality control.
        date: "2018-06-13"
        categories: [R package]

      - path: https://github.com/mcanouil/rdatabase
        image: /projects/assets/images/rdatabase.png
        title: R and Databases (French)
        description: "A two-days workshop on R and databases (+ web scraping)."
        date: "2018-05-03"
        categories: [Workshop, R, Database, French]
---
